evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Déployer des solutions de monitoring pour garantir la qualité et l'efficience de l'infrastructure.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: "Garantir la qualité", "industrialiser des modèles", and "Excellence Opérationnelle" signal correctness and reliability as the dominant value, with no velocity/speed-of-shipping phrases present.
evidence.domain_risk: nous visons la "Pricing Excellence" via une approche globale de Revenue Growth Management
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role directly powers global pricing decisions for a large retailer, affecting revenue outcomes at scale, but there is no explicit financial-reporting, audit, or regulatory language — errors affect commercial decisions without regulatory consequence, so moderate applies.
evidence.data_team_maturity: L'équipe, composée d'experts Data & IA et du Centre d'Excellence, développe des solutions industrielles pour optimiser proactivement la tarification mondiale.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named Centre d'Excellence with Data & AI experts building industrialized global pricing solutions, within a 5,000-person digital organisation, signals an established, specialised data function operating at scale.
evidence.jd_authorship: Modélisation et Semantic Layer : Concevoir et industrialiser des modèles complexes pour la couche sémantique (ventes, stocks, concurrents…).
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name precise deliverables (semantic layer modelling across sales/stock/competitor data, monitoring solutions) and a concrete tech stack — the reader learns exactly what the role builds day to day.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Traduire proactivement les enjeux métiers des stakeholders (Sports, RGM) en solutions data robustes.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Revenue Growth Management (RGM) and global pricing optimisation are the named business drivers, placing this role in a commercial/revenue orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Guider les équipes analytiques dans l'utilisation optimale de la couche insights.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role both designs and industrializes complex semantic models proactively (strategic) and guides/supports analytical teams in using existing infrastructure (execution/support), producing a mixed signal.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The team description mentions "experts Data & IA" but the responsibilities and requirements contain no AI skill expected of the candidate — the AE role itself is standard modelling and monitoring work.
evidence.testing_framing: Déployer des solutions de monitoring pour garantir la qualité et l'efficience de l'infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Monitoring and quality assurance are framed as a deployed, owned responsibility ("Excellence Opérationnelle") using an action verb, not a tool listed among requirements.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Déployer des solutions de monitoring pour garantir la qualité et l'efficience de l'infrastructure.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Quality and monitoring language appears as one of four responsibility pillars rather than dominating the entire framing, and there is no compliance/regulatory/stakeholder-trust language, placing this at moderate.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Concevoir et industrialiser des modèles complexes pour la couche sémantique
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role both designs new complex semantic models (greenfield) and industrializes/monitors existing infrastructure for quality and efficiency (fix_scale), producing a mixed signal.
evidence.loss_aversion: Déployer des solutions de monitoring pour garantir la qualité et l'efficience de l'infrastructure — quality/monitoring is named but is one of four operational pillars, not a dominant risk register.
